title: 1 Number That Should Worry General Dynamics Shareholders
text: General Dynamics beat on the top and bottom lines this week. Free cash flow came in nearly double the reported net income -- but still lags net income over the past 12 months.

title: 7 Dividend Stocks to Buy and Hold for the Next Decade
text: Passive investing is a great way to create long-term returns. It can be as simple as identifying dividend stocks to buy and hold for the next decade or more.

title: General Dynamics (GD) Q1 Earnings Beat, Revenues Rise Y/Y
text: General Dynamics' (GD) first-quarter revenues of $9,881 million beat the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $9,322 million by 6%. Revenues also improve 5.2% from that reported in the year-ago quarter.

title: General Dynamics (GD) Q1 Earnings and Revenues Top Estimates
text: General Dynamics (GD) came out with quarterly earnings of $2.64 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $2.56 per share. This compares to earnings of $2.61 per share a year ago.

title: Aerospace & Defense Stocks Q1 Earnings Due Apr 26: BA, GD & TDY

title: General Dynamics to Webcast 2023 First-Quarter Financial Results Conference Call

title: 7 Stocks About to Soar as Fed Rate Hikes Pause
text: The Federal Reserve instituted its ninth consecutive rate hike just a few days ago, roiling stocks and markets. The 25 basis point increase was in question, though, as banking turmoil led many to believe that the Fed would not increase.

title: Johnson & Johnson, Procter & Gamble Among 11 Companies To Continue Dividend Growth In Early April
text: Eleven companies announced annual dividend increases in March. Colgate-Palmolive started its 7th decade of dividend growth in March with a 2% boost. Steel Dynamics followed up last year's 31% boost with a 25% increase, resulting in a 63% payout increase since 2022.
